chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 172 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.3783/2024 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.3784/2024 09.04.2026 Mr. Yousuf Ali, advocate for the applicant On the last date following order was passed: “Prima facie reference application is time barred by 180 days. Counsel seeks time to assist. At his request adjourned to come up after two weeks” Today once again learned counsel remains unable to assist. There is no application even otherwise under Section 5 of the Limitation Act, 1908. The reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
